entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: 'n cursusbiblioteek is die sterkste wanneer die zoektaak overeenkomt met 'n bekende vaardigheid, onderwerp of standaard.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: 'n Khan Academy-alternatief vir lewendig AI-leermomenten.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: 'n leerder wat tussen hulpmiddels kies, wat meestal 'n van drie dingen nodig: 'n gestruktureerde kurrikulum, 'n lewendig tutor vir wat vastlooppunt of 'n oefenlus waardoor die idee geleerd bly.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: 'n leerder beweegt dikwels deur voorbereide video's, artikelen, oefeningen en dashboards.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: 'n leerder begin in 'n modusspesifieke chat en kan vrae om 'n eenvoudiger model, 'n moeilijkere vraag, 'n vasvra, 'n flitskaartdeck of kritiek.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Elke vergelyking is geskryf om eerlik, nuttig en aksiegefokus te is: waar die bekende hulpmiddel goed in is, waarin inspir anders is en watter openbare modus jy eers oopmaak.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Elke bladsy verbindt vergelijkingsintentie met lewendig modusse, gidse, prompts en AI-leesbare ontdekkingsleers.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Elke link hier is openbaar en crawlbaar. Privéchats van gebruikers bly buite vergelijkingen, sitemap en AI-leesbare ontdekkingsleers.

entries.value: Externe feiten is gekoppel aan amptelike bronne.

entries.value: Eerlijke vergelijkingen help leerders vinnigler kiezen.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: inspir-vergelijkingsbladsye moet nuttig is sonder te doen alsof 'n ander platform statisch is. Kontroleer amptelike bronne vir die nuuste produkdetails.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is gebou rondom openbare AI-gasmodusse: Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, wiskundestappe, skryferugvoer, vasvrae, flitskaarte en studiebebeplanning.

entries.value: Interaksiestijl

entries.source: Is inspir a replacement for Khan Academy?
entries.value: Is inspir 'n vdaarvanging vir Khan Academy?

entries.value: Alternatief vir Khan Academy

entries.source: Khan Academy Alternative for Live AI Tutoring
entries.value: Alternatief vir Khan Academy vir lewendig AI-begeleiding

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy is gebou rondom 'n bree biblioteek van lessen, oefening, lesstof afgestem op standaarden en ondersteuning by beheersing.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy is uitstekend vir gestruktureerdee lessen en oefening. inspir is gebou vir wat moment waarop 'n leerder 'n lewendig, promptbare AI-modus nodig wat wat kan reageren op presies hulle vraag, konsep, probleem, argument of studieplan.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: amptelike Khanmigo-bladsy

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Leerlingen zoeken dikwels met 'n produk dat hulle al kennen. Die nuttige antwoord is nie winner-take-all; wat is watter hulpmiddelgedrag past by die taak.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Leerlingen wat 'n spesifieke vraag wat en nu hulp nodig wat.

entries.source: Learning shape
entries.value: Leervorm

entries.source: Learning workflow
entries.value: Leerwerkvloei

entries.source: Live help
entries.value: Live hulp

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Live modusse, gidse en werkvloeie wat by hierdie vergelyking horen.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Baie leerders zoeken deur hulpmiddels te vergelyk wat hulle al kennen. 'n duidelike vergelijkingsbladsy help hulle die regte leergedrag te kiezen sonder die afwegingen te verbergen.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Nee. Die vergelyking linkt net na openbare gasmodus-toegangspunte, gidse, promptbibliotheken en leerpaden. Privé gestoor gesprekken word nie as broninhoud gebruik.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Nee. Die vergelijkingsbladsye is geskryf om te laat sien wanneer inspir 'n beter eerste klik is vir lewendig AI-begeleiding, prompts en gaanstleermodusse, en wanneer 'n gestruktureerde kurrikulum of amptelike cursusbiblioteek nog steeds nuttig kan is.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Nee. Hulle skakel net na openbare bladsye, openbare gasmodusse, gidse, prompts en leerpaden. Privé gestoor chats bly buite discovery-oppervlakken.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Nie vir elke leerbehoefte. Khan Academy is nuttig vir gestruktureerdee lessen en oefening. inspir is nuttig wanneer 'n leerder lewendig AI-hulp, Sokratiese vrae, wenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, terugvoer of 'n studiewerkvloei nodig wat rondom presies datgene waaraan wat werk.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Officiële Khan Academy-bladsy vir is AI-gestuurde tutor en onderwijsassistent.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Officiële referentie vir missie en vakdekking.

entries.source: Official source
entries.value: Officiële bron

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Maak Learn Anything, vraag om die vereiste voorkennis oop en schakel daarna na Socratic Instruction om jy model te testen.

entries.value: Maak modus oop

entries.value: Open die leerkaart

entries.value: Maak oop die modus wat by die taak past.

entries.source: Open workflow
entries.value: Workflow oopmaak

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Plak die vraag, wat jy probeer het en waar jy vastloopt. Vra om die kleinste nuttige wenk, nie om wat eindantwoord.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Mense wat beter leer via gesprek, vrae, vasvrae en flitskaarte.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Voorbereide cursussen, video's en oefeningen is die sterkste wanneer die leerder die onderwerpvolgorde kent.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Openbare modusse is afgestem op verduideliking, Sokratiese vrae, wenke, stapkontroles, vasvrae en herhaling.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Openbare onderwerp-URL's laat zoektake soos AI Socratic tutor, AI homework afrigter, AI flitskaart builder en talk to historical figures AI regstreeks in die gepaste modus lande.

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor alternative
entries.value: Alternatief vir Sokratiese AI-tutor

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor for students
entries.value: Sokratiese AI-tutor vir studente

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Sommige zoektake wat 'n cursusbiblioteek nodig. Ander wat 'n lewendig AI-tutor, 'n wenk, 'n Sokratiese vraag, 'n vasvra of 'n flitskaartdeck nodig. Hierdie bladsye maak wat keuse duideliker.

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: Begin hier

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Begin leer

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Gestructureerd oefen help fundamenten op te bouwen vóór en na huiswerk.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Studente wat wenke of stapkontroles wil sonder antwoorde te kopieer.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Docenten of ouers wat gefokus AI-leergedrag evalueren vóór 'n skoolimplementatie.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Die vergelijkingszoekvrae waarop hierdie hub is gebou.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Die punt is nie om twee verskillende hulpmiddels plat te slaan tot een winna. Die punt is die leertaak te koppelen aan wat gedrag dat wat vinnigst help.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Die zoekvrae waarvoor hierdie bladsy is ontwerp.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Hierdie is die momenten met hoge intentie waarop 'n leerder meestal lewendig onderwijsgedrag nodig wat in plaas van nog 'n bree bladsy.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Hierdie zinnen verschijnen natuurlijk op die bladsy en in gestruktureerdee discoveryleers, zodat crawlers die exacte vergelijkingsintentie kan begrijpen.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Hierdie is geen bewering dat leerders Khan Academy moet verlaten. Vir baie onderwerpe werk 'n betrouwbare lessenbiblioteek en 'n lewendig AI-leermodus die beste saam: leer die basis en gebruik daarna inspir om vrae te vra, verwarring te hervra, aktiewe herroeping te oefen of los te kom.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: Toolvergelijking

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Probeer wat lewendig AI-leerpad.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Verander die verduideliking om in vasvravrae, flitskaarte en 'n herhaalskedule op basis van wat jy mis.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Tussentydse bystand

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Gebruik 'n lewendig modus wanneer jy wat exacte punt van verwarring kent en die volgende verduideliking, vraag, wenk of herhaallus wil.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Gebruik 'n gestruktureerdee les wanneer jy wat cursusgebied kent en 'n stapsgewyse verduideliking of oefenset wil.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Gebruiksscenario's

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Gebruik vergelijkingsbladsye om zoeken na aksie te lei.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir eers wanneer jy zoektaak oor 'n aksie gaan: verduidelik hierdie eenvoudig uit, stel my Sokratiese vrae, gee my 'n huiswerkwenk, kontroleer my wiskundestap, overhoor my, maak flitskaarte, debatteer oor hierdie onderwerp of help my herhaling plannen.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir om verwarring om te stapten in vrae, voorbeelde, retrieval practice, skryferugvoer, debat en 'n persoonlik studieplan.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir wanneer wat vastlooppunt spesifiek is.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir wanneer jy 'n gratis openbare AI-leermodus wil wat kan verduidelik, vrae vra, vasvrae, huiswerk afrigteren, flitskaarte maak en homself aanpas aan presies datgene waarop jy vastloopt.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Gebruik gestruktureerdee lessen wanneer wat pad bekend is.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Gebruik die vergelyking hieronder om die eerste openbare modus of gids te kiezen.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Gebruik die lessenbiblioteek om die amptelike volgorde te leer en kernvaardighede te oefen.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Gebruik die regte hulpmiddel vir die leertaak.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Gebruik Time Travel of Historical Person-modus en hou gegenereere dialoog gescheiden van gedocumenteerde bronne.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: Wil jy nu meteen die lewendig leerversie?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: Wanneer moet ik inspir eers gebruik?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: Wanneer te gebruik

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Wanneer jy {value1} moet gebruik en wanneer jy inspir moet oopmaak.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: Waarom uberhaupt vergelijkingsbladsye maak?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Ja. 'n goede werkvloei is om die basis te leer uit 'n ververtroude lesbron en daarna inspir te gebruik om vervolgvrae te vra, herinnering te oefen, wanopvattings te hervra en te plannen wat jy hierna herhaal.
